imagePath.description: Path on the rescue system to the OS image tarball.
imagePath.title: imagePath

rootVolumeSize.description: Size (GiB) of the root logical volume carved from vg0.
rootVolumeSize.title: rootVolumeSize

size.description: Size (GiB) of the vg0 LVM volume group.
size.title: size

vSwitch.description:
HCloud vSwitch config used in mode=hybrid to attach bare-metal hosts to the HCloud private network.
Shape: { vlanID: <int> }. Only consumed when mode=hybrid.
vSwitch.title: vSwitch

wipeDisks.description: When true, wipe all disks on bare-metal hosts before installation (annotates HetznerBareMetalHost with capi.syself.com/wipe-disk=all).
wipeDisks.title: wipeDisks

cloudCredentialsSecretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret holding HCloud token and (for bare-metal/hybrid) Hetzner Robot user/password.
cloudCredentialsSecretName.title: cloudCredentialsSecretName

apiServer.description:
Operator-supplied kube-apiserver customization, rendered by kubeaid-cli from the typed cluster.apiServer block (OIDC AuthenticationConfiguration, audit logging). Shape:
  extraArgs: { <flag>: <value> }
  extraVolumes: [{ name, hostPath, mountPath, readOnly, pathType }]
  files: [{ path, content }]
apiServer.title: apiServer

bareMetal.title: bareMetal

host.description:
Pre-provisioned control-plane endpoint host (floating IP, VPN-reachable IP, etc.).
Required when controlPlane.hcloud.loadBalancer.enabled is false. Ignored otherwise.
host.title: host

extraCertSANs.description: Extra DNS names included in the apiserver TLS cert SAN list, alongside controlPlane.endpoint.host. Used for in-mesh hostnames clients reach the apiserver under (e.g. NetBird-form names).
extraCertSANs.title: extraCertSANs

loadBalancer.description: Runtime info about the control-plane LB, populated by kubeaid-cli after pre-provisioning. Distinct from controlPlane.hcloud.loadBalancer (chart-time config knobs).

privateIP.description: Private (Hetzner Network) IP of the control-plane LB. Used by the postKubeadmCommand that patches kube-system/coredns to resolve controlPlane.endpoint.host.
privateIP.title: privateIP

bootstrapPublicIP.description: Public IP the LB carries during the bootstrap window only (removed once NetBird is up). Optional; included in the CoreDNS hosts entry while present so clients off the mesh can reach apiserver during bootstrap.
bootstrapPublicIP.title: bootstrapPublicIP

loadBalancer.title: loadBalancer

enabled.description:
If true, HCloud provisions a public load-balancer fronting the apiserver (public-network scenario).
If false, the control-plane is reached via controlPlane.endpoint.host (private-network scenario).
enabled.title: enabled

region.description: HCloud region the load-balancer is placed in. Only meaningful when enabled=true.
region.title: region

machineType.description: HCloud machine type for control-plane nodes (e.g. cax11, cpx31).
machineType.title: machineType

regions.description: HCloud regions the control-plane is spread across.
regions.title: regions

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

cidrBlock.description: CIDR block for the HCloud private network the cluster runs on.
cidrBlock.title: cidrBlock

enableVSwitchIntegration.description: Attach an HCloud vSwitch (for connecting bare-metal servers to the HCloud private network).
enableVSwitchIntegration.title: enableVSwitchIntegration

imageName.description: HCloud image name used when provisioning HCloud machines.
imageName.title: imageName

natGatewayIP.description: IP of the NAT gateway nodes route through for egress when they have no public IP. Default matches the first usable host in the default cidrBlock (10.0.0.0/16 → 10.0.0.1). Override when running on a custom private network.
natGatewayIP.title: natGatewayIP

dnsServer.description: Public DNS resolver written to /etc/resolv.conf on private-only nodes during cloud-init. Defaults to Cloudflare 1.1.1.1; override for sovereignty / internal-DNS setups.
dnsServer.title: dnsServer

subnetCidrBlock.description: CIDR block for the HCloud subnet servers attach to.
subnetCidrBlock.title: subnetCidrBlock

zone.description: HCloud network zone the cluster's private network lives in.
zone.title: zone

mode.description:
Hetzner deployment mode:
  hcloud     - control-plane and node-groups all in HCloud.
  bare-metal - control-plane and node-groups all on dedicated Hetzner servers.
  hybrid     - control-plane in HCloud, node-groups mixed HCloud + Hetzner bare-metal.
mode.title: mode

type.description:
Networking model for the workload cluster:
  private - nodes run on an HCloud private network (or VSwitch in hybrid)
            and the bootstrap assumes NAT egress via a gateway; no public
            IPv4/IPv6 on HCloud machines.
  public  - nodes use public IPv4/IPv6 directly; no private-network /
            NAT bootstrap assumptions are applied.
In mode=hybrid this is effectively always private (hybrid intrinsically
uses a private network to link HCloud and bare-metal sides).
type.title: type

bareMetal.description:
Bare-metal node-groups. Item shape:
  name, labels (map), bareMetalHosts: [{ serverID, wwns: [ "0x..." ] }].
bareMetal.title: bareMetal

hcloud.description:
HCloud node-groups. Item shape:
  name, replicas, minSize, maxSize, machineType, cpu, memory, rootVolumeSize,
  labels (map), taints (array of {key,value,effect}).
hcloud.title: hcloud

name.description: Name of the HCloud SSH key resource ClusterAPI will reference.
name.title: name

secretName.description: Kubernetes Secret name holding the SSH key-pair (keys sshkey-name / ssh-privatekey / ssh-publickey).
secretName.title: secretName
